storyInfo: Old misunderstandings with her former boss hang over Umiri like a fog, and as she grapples with whether to join her new boss's famiglia or not, a captive Sakiko sheds light on his schemes for her.

attributes.content: At first, I treated it as no more than an ordinary job.
A small, unremarkable famiglia needed my strength to find their footing in turbulent Siracusa.
But with every day that passed, they came to trust me more, even letting me in on important family meetings.
I knew it was never part of the contract, but I very much enjoyed the feeling of belonging with these people.
Yo, Umiri, my girl! Been a few days since I saw you. How you doing?
attributes.name: Francis

attributes.content: Here, some tangerine cream pudding. If I remember right, that's your flavor of choice, yeah?
attributes.name: Francis

attributes.content: No need, I have my own.
attributes.name: Umiri Yahata

attributes.content: Hey, screw you, be a little grateful!
attributes.name: Francis

attributes.content: I heard you chased off those goons harassing us, all by yourself! Just wanted to show my appreciation!
attributes.name: Francis

attributes.content: Keep your distance from me. I'm just a hired thug doing what I'm paid to. I'll be leaving once I'm done.
attributes.name: Umiri Yahata

attributes.content: If your boss sees the two of us getting friendly, it won't end well for you.
attributes.name: Umiri Yahata

attributes.content: It'll be fine. He was telling me earlier, for a while now he's been thinking of inviting you in with us...
attributes.name: Francis

attributes.content: ...I recommend you ask around Siracusa about my reputation.
attributes.name: Umiri Yahata

attributes.content: Who needs to ask? You're the strongest person we've ever met!
attributes.name: Francis

attributes.content: If you ask me, better say yes right now. We'll get together for tonight's family dinner—
attributes.name: Francis

attributes.content: You say it's a family dinner, but it's usually more of a band concert...
attributes.name: Umiri Yahata

attributes.content: Hey, we might not be the strongest famiglia, but you can't beat our sense of camaraderie!
attributes.name: Francis

attributes.content: Besides, you joined in the jam session plenty of times. Everyone really gets along with you, y'know.
attributes.name: Francis

attributes.content: ...We can talk about this when I'm free.
attributes.name: Umiri Yahata

attributes.content: That's what you said last time—
attributes.name: Francis

attributes.content: I'm going now.
attributes.name: Umiri Yahata

attributes.content: I turned down his kind invitation.
But as I walked home, my heart was filled with some nameless emotion.
One I have never felt before.
That night, I lay on my bed, tossing and turning. I got no sleep at all.
Before the sun rose, I had packed all my things—
...Who would come looking here?
attributes.name: Umiri Yahata

attributes.content: Umiri. There's been a situation with the boss, and he wants you to take some of the heat.
attributes.name: Serious Mobster

attributes.content: But I already decided to...
attributes.name: Umiri Yahata

attributes.content: We've made arrangements with the prison. They're waiting for you downstairs.
attributes.name: Serious Mobster

attributes.content: Here's your payment. If you don't think it's enough, we can always add more.
attributes.name: Serious Mobster

attributes.content: Umiri, what's gotten into you today? I say something?
attributes.name: Serious Mobster

attributes.content: This is how it's always been, yeah? This is the deal—we pay up, you do the job.
attributes.name: Serious Mobster

attributes.content: C'mon, get going. We'll find a way to get your sentence down to six months. That's no time at all. You'll be out before you know it.
attributes.name: Serious Mobster

attributes.content: As a hired hand, it's not uncommon at all to have to be the fall guy. I know my way around life in prison.
But just this one time, this one single time, I suffered like nothing else.
For six months, there wasn't a single moment that I wasn't thinking of getting out, of returning to the famiglia, to their band's parties.
I'd found for myself where I belonged.
But I never thought it would end like this—
The don's dead, everyone's dead! We had hundreds of people, and now it's just our dozen left!
attributes.name: Francis

attributes.content: We busted our asses moving from Columbia to this stupid place, but you had to go and get everyone killed!
attributes.name: Francis

attributes.content: What happened in these six months?
I don't know. The only thing I do know is that—
Once again, I've lost my 'home'.
Umiri. You've done a lot for me, at great personal risk to yourself. You've earned a position from me.
attributes.name: Wizened Voice

attributes.content: I permit you to join my famiglia.
attributes.name: Wizened Voice

attributes.content: ...You know I've always been a lone agent. I won't be joining any famiglie.
attributes.name: Umiri Yahata

attributes.content: Because you don't want to, or because you can't?
attributes.name: Wizened Voice

attributes.content: I'm not like those ruffians who go about calling themselves 'Don', Umiri.
attributes.name: Wizened Voice

attributes.content: Over half my life I've been here, wrangling with the big famiglie. They're tricky, they're sly. Never once left this poker table.
attributes.name: Wizened Voice

attributes.content: You want me to get you to a table with bigger stakes?
attributes.name: Umiri Yahata

attributes.content: Clever girl.
attributes.name: Wizened Voice

attributes.content: This is separate from making a deal. I need to do a lot more thinking when it comes to joining a famiglia.
attributes.name: Umiri Yahata

attributes.content: The only thing I need to consider in a deal is the money on offer. If I'm going to be part of a famiglia, I need to consider the character of its leader.
attributes.name: Umiri Yahata

attributes.content: Kheheh, I know I don't have the best reputation. But that's precisely what we have in common, isn't it?
attributes.name: Wizened Voice

attributes.content: Umiri. Is anyone willing to take you in, aside from me?
attributes.name: Wizened Voice

attributes.content: Siracusa's a dangerous place. All you'll find under the banner of Famiglia e Ordine are conspiracies and schemes.
attributes.name: Wizened Voice

attributes.content: How long since you had a peaceful night's sleep?
attributes.name: Wizened Voice

attributes.content: Lying on your cardboard boxes, dagger in hand in case anyone tries to sneak up on you...
attributes.name: Wizened Voice

attributes.content: 'The lone wolf finally finds a home'.
attributes.name: Wizened Voice

attributes.content: A return to the pack, a restoration of rank and reputation... or a mutt's death in the wilds, your corpse quartered by hungry beasts.
attributes.name: Wizened Voice

attributes.content: It's your choice.
attributes.name: Wizened Voice

attributes.content: Boss, she's led some suspect folks here.
attributes.name: Serious Mobster

attributes.content: Sakiko's hands are shackled behind her. She cannot move them an inch.
There was another. He managed to run. We're sending boys after him.
attributes.name: Serious Mobster

attributes.content: Do you know this signorina, Umiri?
attributes.name: Wizened Voice

attributes.content: I don't.
attributes.name: Umiri Yahata

attributes.content: Don't you recall that we have old debts to settle?
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Seems she holds something against you.
attributes.name: Wizened Voice

attributes.content: I'll give you time, I'll give you space, Umiri. You handle this yourself.
attributes.name: Wizened Voice

attributes.content: I already said I don't know her...
attributes.name: Umiri Yahata

attributes.content: This is your final test before you join my famiglia.
attributes.name: Wizened Voice

attributes.content: This time... better not try to fake the scene with blood bags.
attributes.name: Wizened Voice

attributes.content: Sakiko and Umiri are left alone in the alleyway.
But both know there are people invested in how their duel ends.
Umiri knows the boss is watching.
Sakiko knows Morpheus is watching too.
I don't have anything against you. Why are you trying to get killed?
attributes.name: Umiri Yahata

attributes.content: I am here to bring you back.
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Bring me back?
attributes.name: Umiri Yahata

attributes.content: Not back to the billiards room, but back to the place you're meant to be.
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: I don't understand what you're talking about.
attributes.name: Umiri Yahata

attributes.content: Even so, I have to pull you out of this. I cannot allow you to throw your life away in this manner.
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Your boss sent his underlings to stab Francis's people in the back.
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: I hardly believe that the man who stabbed you in the back would grant you the home you wish for.
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: But... but...
attributes.name: Umiri Yahata

attributes.content: Exploited like a piece, sacrificed like a pawn, again and again... Is this really the life you want? Is this the trust you so desire?
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: In all the time you've spent here, not once have you wanted to hurt a single soul.
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Just a moment ago, I saw your case inside. Your bass is in there, isn't it?
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: You never needed to suffer like this, Umiri.
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Umiri... Let's get out of here. Together.
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa
